'''鈭歳-d-t''' ('''karadat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pentest|pentest]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-d-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pentest|pentest]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-d-t
|-
! Lemma
| karadat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiradat|thiradat]] || [[word:jiradat|jiradat]] || [[word:shiradat|shiradat]] || [[word:kiradat|kiradat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuradat|thuthuradat]] || [[word:jujuradat|jujuradat]] || [[word:shushuradat|shushuradat]] || [[word:kukuradat|kukuradat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuradat|thuradat]] || [[word:juradat|juradat]] || [[word:shuradat|shuradat]] || [[word:kuradat|kuradat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuradat|thuradat]] || [[word:juradat|juradat]] || [[word:shuradat|shuradat]] || [[word:kuradat|kuradat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theradat|theradat]] || [[word:jeradat|jeradat]] || [[word:sheradat|sheradat]] || [[word:keradat|keradat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoradat|thothoradat]] || [[word:jojoradat|jojoradat]] || [[word:shoshoradat|shoshoradat]] || [[word:kokoradat|kokoradat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoradat|thoradat]] || [[word:joradat|joradat]] || [[word:shoradat|shoradat]] || [[word:koradat|koradat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoradat|thoradat]] || [[word:joradat|joradat]] || [[word:shoradat|shoradat]] || [[word:koradat|koradat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:radat|radat]] || [[word:radat|radat]] || [[word:radat|radat]] || [[word:radat|radat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:radat|radat]] || [[word:radat|radat]] || [[word:radat|radat]] || [[word:radat|radat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:radat|radat]] || [[word:radat|radat]] || [[word:radat|radat]] || [[word:radat|radat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:radat|radat]] || [[word:radat|radat]] || [[word:radat|radat]] || [[word:radat|radat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙radat|th忙radat]] || [[word:j忙radat|j忙radat]] || [[word:sh忙radat|sh忙radat]] || [[word:k忙radat|k忙radat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharadat|thatharadat]] || [[word:jajaradat|jajaradat]] || [[word:shasharadat|shasharadat]] || [[word:kakaradat|kakaradat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharadat|tharadat]] || [[word:jaradat|jaradat]] || [[word:sharadat|sharadat]] || [[word:karadat|karadat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharadat|tharadat]] || [[word:jaradat|jaradat]] || [[word:sharadat|sharadat]] || [[word:karadat|karadat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharadat|sharadat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharadat|gosharadat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharadat|gokisharadat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharadatn眉|sharadatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharadatnkn眉|gosharadatnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharadatn眉|gokisharadatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharadatsh毛|sharadatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharadatnksh毛|gosharadatnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharadatsh毛|gokisharadatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharadatro|sharadatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharadatnkro|gosharadatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharadatro|gokisharadatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharadatmu|sharadatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharadatnkmu|gosharadatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharadatmu|gokisharadatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharadatsher|sharadatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharadatnksher|gosharadatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharadatsher|gokisharadatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharadatng|sharadatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharadatnkng|gosharadatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharadatng|gokisharadatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharadatya|sharadatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharadatnkya|gosharadatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharadatya|gokisharadatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharadatyam|sharadatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharadatnkyam|gosharadatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharadatyam|gokisharadatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharadatn眉sh毛|sharadatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharadatnkn眉sh毛|gosharadatnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharadatn眉sh毛|gokisharadatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharadatn眉ro|sharadatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharadatnkn眉ro|gosharadatnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharadatn眉ro|gokisharadatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharadatn眉mu|sharadatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharadatnkn眉mu|gosharadatnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharadatn眉mu|gokisharadatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharadatsh毛n眉|sharadatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharadatnksh毛n眉|gosharadatnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharadatsh毛n眉|gokisharadatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharadatsh毛ro|sharadatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharadatnksh毛ro|gosharadatnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharadatsh毛ro|gokisharadatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharadatsh毛mu|sharadatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharadatnksh毛mu|gosharadatnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharadatsh毛mu|gokisharadatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharadatron眉|sharadatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharadatnkron眉|gosharadatnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharadatron眉|gokisharadatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharadatrosh毛|sharadatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharadatnkrosh毛|gosharadatnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharadatrosh毛|gokisharadatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharadatromu|sharadatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharadatnkromu|gosharadatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharadatromu|gokisharadatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharadatmun眉|sharadatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharadatnkmun眉|gosharadatnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharadatmun眉|gokisharadatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharadatmush毛|sharadatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharadatnkmush毛|gosharadatnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharadatmush毛|gokisharadatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharadatmuro|sharadatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharadatnkmuro|gosharadatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharadatmuro|gokisharadatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
